steps.title: Spot the parallel words
steps.content: ”Beckoning” appears in a list with “seductive” and “charming,” all describing how cities attract the character. This parallel structure signals that we need a word about attraction or appeal.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”Inviting” means appealing or attractive—exactly what the context shows cities are.

The other three don't express attraction: “demanding” suggests cities require something, “signaling” emphasizes gesture, and “shifting” is unrelated.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
